name: Excise Tax Price Readjustments and Export Credits

eligibility.description: Applies to manufacturers or retailers who have paid excise taxes on articles that are subsequently exported, sold to state/local governments, or where the price was lowered via a bona fide discount or rebate.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for a credit or refund of manufacturers or retail excise taxes when the price is readjusted (rebates/discounts) or the article is exported.
